articles.title: Gov’t considering reducing Budi95 quota to 150L, 60% of Malaysians use less RON95 than that – deputy FM
articles.excerpt: Faced with high oil prices and an increasingly heavy fuel subsidy burden, the Malaysian government is considering a further reduction of the monthly quota for subsidised RON 95 petrol under the Budi Madani RON 95 programme. Budi95 started off with 300 litres …

articles.title: Kaiser threatens to fire SF nurse after Trump admin delays DACA
articles.excerpt: Kaiser Permanente nurses are protesting the healthcare giant’s plan to terminate at least one nurse who is caught in a monthslong delay renewing her immigration work authorization. The nurse was previously covered by the Obama-era Deferred Action for Childhoo…

articles.title: Japan’s 10-year bond yield hits 29-year high as market awaits Bessent's remarks
articles.excerpt: Japan’s 10-year ​government bond yield hit a 29-year high on ‌Tuesday, despite a moderately firm auction, as the ​market awaited comments from U.S. ⁠Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent, who is visiting Tokyo.
articles.content: Japan’s 10-year ​government bond yield hit a 29-year high on ‌Tuesday, despite a moderately firm auction, as the ​market awaited comments from U.S. ⁠Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent, who is visiting Tokyo.
articles.author: Reuters
